mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate signals strong labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE declines by >0.5pp over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts indicate strong consumer demand for durable goods, which drives corporate revenue growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST increases by >5% over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and rising inflation create stagflationary pressures that depress equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls < 90 and CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO declines and CPIAUCSL rises simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by rising federal funds rates, increase borrowing costs for corporations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS increases by >0.5pp over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals expanding manufacturing activity, which boosts corporate profits and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO increases by >1% over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth indicates robust economic expansion, which supports equity valuations and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 60%+ of instances where GDPC1 grows by >2% YoY.

mechanism_narrative: Strong job growth signals improving labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS increases by >100k over 1 month.
